Home › Digital Nomad Visas
Guide · Updated 2026-04-27

Digital nomad visas: 32 programs compared

Every serious digital-nomad visa program, ranked by monthly income requirement. Links go directly to the official government programme page — no aggregators, no guesses.

32programs listed
22tax-friendly
4no income check
$540cheapest entry

Cheapest entry points by income threshold

If you\'re not a high-earner yet, these are the most accessible programs. Pair any of them with a UAE residence permit later for a big travel-access jump (see our UAE residence guide).

CountryProgramMin income / monthDurationFamily
Czech Republic Zivno (Trade License) Visa $540 12mo renewable ✓
Colombia Digital Nomad Visa (V) $976 24mo ✓
Brazil Digital Nomad Visa $1,500 12mo renewable ✓
Cabo Verde Remote Working Cabo Verde $1,642 6mo renewable ✓
Georgia Remotely from Georgia Programme $2,000 12mo renewable ✓

Longest initial validity

Planning to stay put for a while? These programs give the longest initial issue length before you have to renew.

CountryProgramDuration (initial)Min incomeTax-friendly
Thailand Long-Term Resident Visa (Work-from-Thailand) 120 months (renewable) $6,666 ✓
Thailand Destination Thailand Visa (DTV) 60 months (renewable) — —
Indonesia Second Home Visa (E33G KITAS) 60 months (renewable) — ✓
South Africa Remote Worker Visa 36 months (renewable) $3,100 —
Colombia Digital Nomad Visa (V) 24 months $976 ✓

Tax-friendly picks

Foreign-earned income either fully exempt, or a flat low-rate regime available. "Tax-friendly" here means the program doesn\'t try to tax you as a local resident on global income during the permit\'s validity — but every case is individual, so treat this as a shortlist, not advice.

PortugalSpainGreeceUnited Arab EmiratesCroatiaMaltaThailandIndonesiaCosta RicaMexicoColombiaPanamaMauritiusGeorgiaCabo VerdeNamibiaCzech RepublicRomaniaCyprusAnguillaBarbadosJapan

All 32 programs (sorted by income threshold)

Ranked low → high. Null income thresholds (savings-based or free) appear last.

Czech Republic · Zivno (Trade License) Visa

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
$540/mo
Application fee
$220
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
8-16 weeks

Not a nomad visa per se — trade licence (Zivno). Widely used by freelancers. 15% flat income tax. Renewable.

Official programme page ↗

Colombia · Digital Nomad Visa (V)

tax-friendly family
Min income
$976/mo
Application fee
$230
Initial validity
24 months
Processing
3-5 weeks

One of the cheapest income thresholds globally. Valid up to 2 years, NOT renewable — re-apply from scratch.

Official programme page ↗

Brazil · Digital Nomad Visa

renewable family
Min income
$1,500/mo
Application fee
$100
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
4-8 weeks

Launched 2022. Requires $18k/yr income OR $18k savings. Normal Brazilian tax rates apply if you become tax resident.

Official programme page ↗

Cabo Verde · Remote Working Cabo Verde

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
$1,642/mo
Application fee
$25
Initial validity
6 months (renewable)
Processing
2 weeks

Renewable once for another 6 months. Foreign income not taxed. Among the cheapest entry points globally.

Official programme page ↗

Georgia · Remotely from Georgia Programme

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
$2,000/mo
Application fee
Free
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
1-2 weeks

Free programme. 95 nationalities can stay visa-free 1 year anyway; this formalises it. 1% flat tax for freelancers earning under 165k GEL (~$60k).

Official programme page ↗

Malaysia · DE Rantau Nomad Pass

renewable family
Min income
$2,000/mo
Application fee
$234
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
2-4 weeks

MDEC-administered. IT workers must earn $24k+ annually; other fields $60k+. Up to 2 years total via renewal.

Official programme page ↗

Namibia · Digital Nomad Visa

tax-friendly family
Min income
$2,000/mo
Application fee
$62
Initial validity
6 months
Processing
2-4 weeks

Launched 2022. 6 months non-renewable. Foreign income untaxed.

Official programme page ↗

Hungary · White Card

renewable
Min income
$2,275/mo
Application fee
$130
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
2-4 weeks

For non-EU remote workers. Renewable once to 2 years total. Family members must apply through separate channels.

Official programme page ↗

Argentina · Digital Nomad Visa

renewable
Min income
$2,500/mo
Application fee
$200
Initial validity
6 months (renewable)
Processing
4-8 weeks

6-month initial visa, renewable once. Income threshold adjusts with inflation (~$2,500/mo in 2025 terms).

Official programme page ↗

Mexico · Temporary Resident Visa (Economic Solvency)

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
$2,595/mo
Application fee
$242
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
2-4 weeks

Not strictly a "nomad visa" but widely used as one. Renewable up to 4 years, then convertible to permanent residency.

Official programme page ↗

Spain · Digital Nomad Visa (DNV)

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
$2,762/mo
Application fee
$80
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
3-4 weeks

Part of 2022 Startups Law. Flat 24% income tax for up to 4 years under the Beckham Law regime. Up to 5 years renewable.

Official programme page ↗

Croatia · Digital Nomad Residence Permit

tax-friendly family
Min income
$2,780/mo
Application fee
$100
Initial validity
12 months
Processing
2-4 weeks

Income exempt from Croatian tax. 90-day cooldown period before reapplying after the permit expires.

Official programme page ↗

Italy · Digital Nomad Visa

renewable family
Min income
$2,820/mo
Application fee
$120
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
4-8 weeks

Launched April 2024. Requires 6+ months of remote-worker experience and health insurance. Normal Italian tax brackets apply.

Official programme page ↗

Costa Rica · Digital Nomad Visa (Rentista track)

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
$3,000/mo
Application fee
$100
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
8-16 weeks

Couples need $4,000/mo combined. Foreign income exempt from Costa Rican tax. Opens path to permanent residency after 3 years.

Official programme page ↗

Malta · Nomad Residence Permit

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
$3,000/mo
Application fee
$300
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
3-4 weeks

Renewable up to 4 years. Flat 10% income tax on Malta-sourced income (foreign remains untaxed).

Official programme page ↗

Panama · Short-Stay Remote Worker Visa

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
$3,000/mo
Application fee
$1,250
Initial validity
9 months (renewable)
Processing
4-8 weeks

Up to 18 months total (9 + 9 renewal). Foreign income untaxed. Also consider Friendly Nations Visa for Indian/Chinese nationals.

Official programme page ↗

South Africa · Remote Worker Visa

renewable family
Min income
$3,100/mo
Application fee
$90
Initial validity
36 months (renewable)
Processing
4-8 weeks

Published October 2024. Up to 3 years. Exempt from SA tax registration if stay < 183 days / year.

Official programme page ↗

Portugal · D8 Digital Nomad Visa

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
$3,480/mo
Application fee
$95
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
6-12 weeks

Two flavours: temporary stay (1 year) and residence (leads to citizenship after 5 years). NHR tax regime closed to new applicants in 2024; standard Portuguese rates apply.

Official programme page ↗

United Arab Emirates · Virtual Working Programme (1-year)

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
$3,500/mo
Application fee
$287
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
1-2 weeks

0% personal income tax in UAE. Opens Emirates ID and UAE residency for travel benefits (see our residence-permit guides). Sponsor: yourself.

Official programme page ↗

Cyprus · Digital Nomad Visa

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
$3,800/mo
Application fee
$80
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
5-7 weeks

Non-Dom tax regime: 50% tax exemption on income over €55k for 17 years. Limited to 500 permits initially (expanded in 2023).

Official programme page ↗

Greece · Digital Nomad Visa

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
$3,800/mo
Application fee
$80
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
4-10 weeks

Family members need +20% income. 50% income tax break for 7 years if you relocate tax residence.

Official programme page ↗

Romania · Digital Nomad Visa

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
$3,950/mo
Application fee
$120
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
2-4 weeks

Foreign income exempt from Romanian tax if stay < 183 days / year. EU Schengen member from 2024.

Official programme page ↗

Barbados · Barbados Welcome Stamp

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
$4,167/mo
Application fee
$2,000
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
1-2 weeks

First Caribbean digital-nomad visa (2020). $3,000 for families. Foreign income not taxed in Barbados.

Official programme page ↗

Estonia · Digital Nomad Visa

Min income
$4,500/mo
Application fee
$100
Initial validity
12 months
Processing
2-4 weeks

First dedicated nomad visa globally (2020). Non-renewable. Spouse/children apply separately. Estonia e-Residency is unrelated.

Official programme page ↗

South Korea · Digital Nomad Visa (F-1-D)

renewable family
Min income
$5,640/mo
Application fee
$80
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
3-6 weeks

Launched January 2024. 2 years total with renewal. Must prove 1+ years of remote work experience with current employer.

Official programme page ↗

Japan · Digital Nomad Visa

tax-friendly family
Min income
$5,830/mo
Application fee
Free
Initial validity
6 months
Processing
4-6 weeks

Launched April 2024. Only 49 eligible nationalities. 6 months non-renewable (must leave 6+ months before reapplying). Private health insurance mandatory.

Official programme page ↗

Thailand · Long-Term Resident Visa (Work-from-Thailand)

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
$6,666/mo
Application fee
$1,666
Initial validity
120 months (renewable)
Processing
4-10 weeks

10-year multiple-entry visa. 17% flat income tax. Must work for a publicly-traded or large-revenue company overseas. Family included.

Official programme page ↗

Iceland · Long-term Visa for Remote Workers

family
Min income
$7,800/mo
Application fee
$99
Initial validity
6 months
Processing
2-4 weeks

Highest income threshold in Europe. 6 months non-renewable. Family income together must be 1.3M ISK/month.

Official programme page ↗

Anguilla · Work-from-Anguilla Programme

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
No income check
Application fee
$2,000
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
2-4 weeks

Family of 4 pays $3,000 total. 0% personal income tax. Quiet beach-island option in the Caribbean.

Official programme page ↗

Indonesia · Second Home Visa (E33G KITAS)

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
No income check
Application fee
$200
Initial validity
60 months (renewable)
Processing
2-4 weeks

Savings-based: requires $130,000 deposit in Indonesian bank. 5-year or 10-year variants. Foreign income untaxed if properly structured.

Official programme page ↗

Mauritius · Premium Visa

tax-friendly renewable family
Min income
No income check
Application fee
Free
Initial validity
12 months (renewable)
Processing
1 weeks

Free visa. No income requirement BUT proof of remote employment. Income not taxed in Mauritius if brought in as savings.

Official programme page ↗

Thailand · Destination Thailand Visa (DTV)

renewable family
Min income
No income check
Application fee
$280
Initial validity
60 months (renewable)
Processing
2-3 weeks

Launched July 2024. 5-year multiple-entry; each stay up to 180 days. Requires 500,000 THB (~$14k) in savings. Much easier than LTR.

Official programme page ↗

Frequently asked questions

Which country has the cheapest digital nomad visa?
By income threshold, Czech Republic (Zivno (Trade License) Visa) has the lowest official minimum — around $540/month. Colombia is close behind. See the "Cheapest entry points" section above.
Which digital nomad visas give the best tax treatment?
22 of the 32 programs listed here either exempt foreign-earned income or offer a flat low-rate regime. Popular picks: UAE (0%), Thailand LTR (17% flat), Portugal (Portuguese rates, ex-NHR), Cyprus (50% exemption on >€55k). Always get local tax advice before relocating — "exempt" usually means "if structured correctly".
Which nomad visas don't require proof of income?
4 programs skip the monthly-income check: Thailand, Indonesia, Mauritius, Anguilla. They usually substitute a savings / bank-balance requirement or a flat application fee.
Can I bring my family on a digital nomad visa?
Most programs allow dependants (spouse + children), but many require an additional income buffer — typically +20% to +50% per dependant. A handful (Estonia, Hungary White Card, Iceland) are single-applicant only. Check the "Family allowed" column above.
Do I need to pay tax in the country where I'm a nomad?
Depends on (1) how many days you stay, and (2) whether the country has a "tax residence based on physical presence" rule (most do, at 183 days). Many programs specifically exempt you from local tax if your stay is under the threshold OR if income comes from abroad. Get professional tax advice if you're nomadding in one country for 6+ months.
Can I switch to a residence permit or citizenship later?
Yes — many programs (Portugal D8, Spain DNV, Mexico Temporary Resident, Colombia, Panama, Mauritius) are renewable and convert to permanent residency after 3-5 years, eventually leading to citizenship. See individual entries above for path-to-citizenship notes.
How current is this list?
Compiled from official government programme pages. Data is a point-in-time snapshot — visa rules, income thresholds, and fees change without notice. Always confirm with the embassy or official programme page (linked per entry) before applying.
